model_notes: Dual-branch GCN + EMA teacher KD + transformer model with BCE task loss, intra-modal MSE KD, and graph-level cross-modal InfoNCE KD (CLIP-style, asymmetric predictor against opposite-branch EMA teacher pool) during stage 1. Optional cosine ramp on EMA momentum (ema_decay_init -> ema_decay) over stage 1 epochs.
